title: Bright Plus
description: Get Full Brightness in Minecraft with Bright Plus texture pack (Only Sodium with PolyTone)
body:
**Bright Plus** is a **Fullbright** texture pack, which removes darkness from your game, making everything bright and easy to see. This is perfect for survival players, builders, and explorers who want a clearer view without using torches or night vision potions.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e9ecf38193750f46ca10d498b615fe077a67cee.jpeg)

## Requirements

To use Bright Plus, you’ll need to install the following mods:

* **Sodium** – a performance optimization mod for Minecraft.
* **Polytone** –  a client-side customization mod which allows tweaking various aspect with the game via Resource Packs

These mods are essential for Bright Plus to work properly.
### ⚠️ Restart the game if Bright Plus is not working 

## Supported Versions

Bright Plus works on **all Minecraft versions from 1.16.3 to the latest**. No matter what version you’re playing, Bright Plus will brighten up your world!

## Features of Bright Plus

* ✅ Fullbright support for Sodium (not available for optifine and vanilla)
* ✅ Works on all versions from **1.16.3 to Latest**.
* ✅ Makes caves, underwater areas, and night-time exploration super easy.
* ✅ Created by **SpunkyInsaan**, a trusted name in the community.

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
